LanguageData.VCE_FineStewRecipe.description: Turns an uncooked fine stew into 10 cooked fine stews.
LanguageData.VCE_FineStewRecipe.label: Cook Fine Stew
LanguageData.VCE_LavishStewRecipe.description: Turns an uncooked lavish stew into 10 cooked lavish stews.
LanguageData.VCE_LavishStewRecipe.label: Cook Lavish Stew
LanguageData.VCE_SimpleStewRecipe.description: Turns an uncooked simple stew into 10 cooked simple stews.
LanguageData.VCE_SimpleStewRecipe.label: Cook Simple Stew
